project_metadata.description: A warm, editorial-style single-page website for Fresh Grocers, Sri Lanka’s veteran grocery delivery service. Blending local flavor with clear CTAs, real testimonials, city coverage visualization, and trustworthy design.
project_metadata.core_purpose: Present Fresh Grocers' value proposition convincingly and drive inbound orders by building trust and clarity.
project_metadata.target_audience: Sri Lankan individuals and families seeking trustworthy, easy grocery delivery; especially those seeking local, fresh produce and certainty about coverage.
key_features: Contact-focused footer with social and legal links

pages.purpose: Drive new customer orders and showcase credibility for Fresh Grocers via a comprehensive yet simple landing experience.
pages.description: A single, editorial-styled landing page for Fresh Grocers. Warm cream backgrounds with indigo call-to-action elements, integrating dynamic lists for delivery cities/suburban areas and rotating testimonials from real customers — both fetched server-side. Layout flows from sticky header to hero, features, three-step how-it-works visual, a delivery map/list, carousel of real testimonials, and a comprehensive local-contact footer. Designed warm, trustworthy, with Mercury's editorial flavor and tailored to Sri Lankan context. Responsive, minimal, and conversion-optimized.
pages.content_notes: This landing page includes ALL functional sections as components within a single route. Section order: Header, HeroLanding, FeaturesGrid, HowItWorksSteps, DeliveryCoverageMap, TestimonialsCarousel, Footer. Real delivery cities/suburbs and testimonials fetched dynamically from backend; others are static. Pill-shaped CTAs and editorial type ensure warm, local feel. All CTAs route to phone/mailto or in-section scroll — no extra pages. No login/auth provided (pure lead gen).

navigation.style: transparent, editorial quad-grid, sticky, with CTA right

theme.design_dna: Mercury warm: cream backgrounds, warm-gray ink, indigo CTA buttons, editorial typography, large corner radii, soft elevation, locally-inspired illustrations, and responsive spacing. All applications must feel welcoming and trustworthy, prioritizing large amounts of neutral space with low saturation and warm visual cues.
theme.color_scheme: Cream background (#FEF9F6), warm gray ink, indigo CTA
theme.font_type: Editorial serif for headings, clean sans-serif for body
theme.shadow_style: Smooth, low-contrast shadow for all elevated elements; indigo-tinted for CTAs
theme.animation_style: Subtle fade/lift with Framer Motion, editorial transitions for CTA buttons/carousel
theme.interaction_style: Editorial hover on buttons/links, grow+fade-in, smooth scroll anchors

components.description: Sticky top navigation bar with cream background (#FEF9F6), 32px left/right padding, 20px vertical padding. Left: Fresh Grocers logo text in bold, warm-gray ink (text-warmGray-700), font-family: 'Mercury Editorial'. Right: Animated indigo (primary) pill-shaped 'Order Now' button with Framer Motion hover grow effect (indigo-600, white text), opening a phone/mailto link. Includes nav animation fade-in, adapts to mobile with hamburger collapse. CTA always visible.
components.purpose: Displays the site logo and primary call-to-action button, provides navigation entry point.

components.description: Fullscreen hero (min-h-80vh), center-aligned editorial headline (font-bold, 3xl, indigo-700), subheadline in warm-gray. CTA 'Get Started' indigo pill button (Framer Motion subtle grow, shadow-indigo, border-radius-lg) next to muted outline secondary CTA. Subtle background illustration of Sri Lanka produce in low-opacity. Top/bottom 60px padding; 1.5rem gap between elements; vertically and horizontally centered. Responsive for mobile. On 'Get Started' click, scrolls smoothly to 'How it Works'.
components.purpose: Conveys the value of Fresh Grocers and prompts visitors to start ordering.

components.description: Three-column (or one-column on mobile) grid, padded 40px, with cards for: 'Fast Delivery', 'Fresh Produce', 'Easy Ordering', 'Customer Support'. Each card: cream background, subtle indigo-tinted shadow, rounded-xl, icon atop (custom SVG, warm indigo), title (lg, indigo-600, bold), body text (warm-gray-700, 500), 16px margin between cards. Hover: subtle card lift with Framer Motion. Icons local and editorial-inspired. Responsive down to XS screens.
components.purpose: Highlights the 4 core benefits with imagery and text.

components.description: Horizontal (desktop) or vertical (mobile) sequence: 3 steps with numbered indigo circles, each step: title (bold, indigo-600), explanatory text (sm, warm-gray-700). Steps are: 'Browse Fresh Produce', 'Place Your Order', 'Get Fast Delivery'. Aries-style connector line for visual flow. Top/bottom 40px spacing, white card background with subtle cream borders, slight drop-shadow. Smooth staggered fade-in animation as user scrolls.
components.purpose: Explains the simple order process in 3 clear steps.

components.description: Section with cream background and warm-gray ink. Left: stylized outline map of Sri Lanka with city markers (SVG, indigo points). Right: list/grid of city names dynamically fetched from the backend (indigo tags, editorial font). At mobile, stack: map above, list below. 48px vertical padding, subtle section heading ('We Deliver Across Sri Lanka'), 14px gaps between city tags. Map-sized 300px wide desktop, full width mobile. Accessible for all users.
components.purpose: Shows where Fresh Grocers delivers, instilling confidence in service reach.

components.description: Wide carousel with cream background, indigo controls. Each slide: rounded-xl card, shadow, customer avatar (letter monogram, colored circle), name (bold, indigo), city (caption), review text (italic, warm-gray-800), 1-5 star rating (indigo/yellow SVGs). Carousel auto-scrolls every 6s (Framer Motion), pausable on hover/touch. Small arrows for manual navigation. Accessibility: keyboard/aria controls. Data from backend, paginated fetch. Responsive: 1-2 cards visible on mobile, 3 on desktop.
components.purpose: Shows real customer reviews to establish trust and social proof.

components.description: Cream background footer with top border (indigo-50). 32px top/bottom and side padding. Left: Fresh Grocers logo/wordmark, tagline text (sm, warm-gray-500). Center: address, phone, email (each with warm-gray icon left, indigo-accented link hover). Right: Social icons (local SVG), privacy and terms links. On mobile: stack columns. Lower 12px copyright strip, small text. Editorial typography, rounded corners, warm shadow.
components.purpose: Contains essential contact info, navigation, and compliance links.

apis.purpose: Retrieve a paginated list of customer testimonials to display on the landing page.
apis.response: { "testimonials": [ { "id": integer, "customer_name": string, "city": string, "review": string, "rating": integer } ], "total": integer }

apis.purpose: Fetch all cities/suburban areas covered by Fresh Grocers delivery service.

frontend.styling: Tailwind CSS v4 (custom config for Mercury palette), CSS modules for illustrations
frontend.state_management: Local state, React hooks, SWR or React Query for data fetching
frontend.animation: Framer Motion for button and section transitions, smooth scroll for anchors, carousel motion
